case_title: ERIC SCHLEELEIN VS. LUIS MEDEROS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SCHLEELEIN, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT MEDEROS, LUIS CABRERA, GABRIELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY SCHLEELEIN, ERIC MEDEROS, LUIS CABRERA, GABRIELA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHLEELEIN, ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDEROS, LUIS CABRERA, GABRIELA $3,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $166.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,616.75, THIS AWARD IS AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY AND REPRESENTS $2,120.00 IN UNPAID RENT AND $1,330.00 FOR DAMAGE TO THE PROPERTY. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IN DENIED AS THEY ARE NEITHER RECOVERABLE IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT NOR AUHORIZED BY THE LEASE AGREEMENT AT ISSUE IN THIS CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO LUIS MEDEROS.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CABRERA, GABRIELA HEARING SET FOR AUG-06-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT MEDEROS, LUIS CABRERA, GABRIELA ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF REGARDING DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT BY MONTHLY INSTALLMENT OF $75.00
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S RESPONSE ON NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR REPAYMENT O FJUDGMENT IN INSTALLMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY LUIS MEDEROS, GABRIELA CABRERA IS GRANTED. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING SEPTEMBER 15, 2009 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF THE MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
NOTICE OF MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT, GRANTED RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO LUIS MEDEROS.
